calendar.matters: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Responses To Request For Admissions, Set One; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Kuo-Yu (James) Pao
Off Calendar May-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Bryan Vix, Esq. 415-434-2111 Coopers Law for Plaintiff.
Emily Zinn, Esq. 562-624-2183 Behar Gibbs Savage Paulson for Defendant.
Gregory Brezovec, Esq. 213-891-9100 Clark Hill for Defendant Lyft.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.
Mr. Vix contests and presents arguments; language and translation issue, requests to allow depo of interpreters.
Ms. Zinn agrees with the TR and responds to Plaintiff's arguments; innacurate, states timeline.
Court reminds parties to stick with the record; states this is a simpler issue to relieve Defendant from his inital admissions and file amended responses.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling in full.

Defendant Kenny Mo's Motion for Leave to Amend Responses To Request For Admissions, Set One is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
